unified_frame_statement: Mike shares his absurdity awakening with Coach Jenny, showing how finding humor in failure helped him overcome perfectionism shame and embrace imperfect action.

state_alpha.internal_monologue: "If it's not perfect, I'm a failure."
state_alpha.sensory_anchor: The clenched stomach before every presentation

the_abyss.realization: "I survived the worst. And... it was kind of funny."

the_spark.insight_quote: "She made me do stand-up about my worst failure. I laughed for the first time in years." (16:32)

state_omega.action: Celebrates failures in weekly team meetings

sensory_anchors: The tight throat before speaking before
The genuine belly laugh during the exercise
The easy smile when things go wrong now
